About This Product

The Campus Ju Jubee Women's Sneakers bring together everyday comfort and a trend-forward silhouette. A cloud-soft insole cushions every step, while the lightweight build keeps you moving without fatigue through long college days, city walks, or weekend travel. The subtle floral detailing adds a feminine edge to a classic sneaker shape, and the durable outsole is designed for daily wear. Easy to clean and built to last, they're a versatile pick for college, walking, daily wear, and travel.

About This Product

The Hammer Airflow Neo Earbuds deliver 80 hours of total playtime across the earbuds and charging case, so you're never caught with a dead battery mid-session. Type-C fast charging gets you back to full power quickly, while powerful bass and crystal-clear call quality make them equally suited for music, gaming, and everyday calls. Sweat and splash resistance means they can handle workouts, commutes, and travel without missing a beat.
